alambadi.care: Needs open grazing space and regular health monitoring
alambadi.description: Alambadi cattle are a native Indian breed known for their strength, endurance, and suitability for draught work.

amritmahal.food: Green fodder, dry fodder, and grains
amritmahal.care: Requires proper nutrition and space for movement
amritmahal.description: Amritmahal cattle are known for their speed and strength, mainly used for draught purposes in India.

ayrshire.care: Regular milking and proper dairy management
ayrshire.description: Ayrshire cattle are a dairy breed known for their high milk production and adaptability to different climates.
